app.title: Appreciation Habit
app.description: Record small moments of appreciation to strengthen connection and positive feelings toward your partner.

gratitude.heading: What did you appreciate about your partner today?
gratitude.subheading: Take a moment to notice and record a supportive or loving gesture from your partner.

item1.label: Appreciation 1
item1.placeholder: e.g., Thank you for making a warm cup of coffee this morning when I was rushing...

item2.label: Appreciation 2
item2.placeholder: e.g., I appreciated when you listened attentively while I talked about my stressful workday...

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

mood.heading: How did this appreciation make you feel?
mood.subheading: Notice the positive emotional shift when focusing on gratitude for your partner.

intro_p1: Strengthen positive feelings toward your partner
intro_p2: Notice the small things they do that make you feel loved
intro_p3: Build a lasting connection habit together
